---
title: "02_eda"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(scales)
```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load interim data
#--------------------------------------------------

clinical_master <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "clinical_master.rds"))
expr_t <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "expression_clean.rds"))
meth_t <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "methylation_clean.rds"))
merged_clinical_expression <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_expression.rds"))
merged_clinical_methylation <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_methylation.rds"))
merged_clinical_multiomic <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_multiomic.rds"))
```

```{r}
make_survival_500 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      survival_500 = case_when(
        !is.na(days_to_death) & days_to_death <= 500 ~ "No",
        !is.na(days_to_death) & days_to_death > 500 ~ "Yes",
        is.na(days_to_death) & !is.na(days_to_follow_up) & days_to_follow_up > 500 ~ "Yes",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      survival_500 = factor(survival_500, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
    )
}

clinical_master <- make_survival_500(clinical_master)
merged_clinical_expression <- make_survival_500(merged_clinical_expression)
merged_clinical_methylation <- make_survival_500(merged_clinical_methylation)
merged_clinical_multiomic <- make_survival_500(merged_clinical_multiomic)

```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Cohort sizes
#--------------------------------------------------

cohort_summary <- tibble(
  cohort = c("clinical_master", "expression_only", "methylation_only", "multiomic"),
  n_rows = c(
    nrow(clinical_master),
    nrow(merged_clinical_expression),
    nrow(merged_clinical_methylation),
    nrow(merged_clinical_multiomic)
  ),
  n_unique_cases = c(
    n_distinct(clinical_master$case_submitter_id),
    n_distinct(merged_clinical_expression$case_submitter_id),
    n_distinct(merged_clinical_methylation$case_submitter_id),
    n_distinct(merged_clinical_multiomic$case_submitter_id)
  )
)

cohort_summary

write_csv(
  cohort_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "cohort_summary.csv")
)
```

```{r}
clinical_missing_summary <- clinical_master %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ mean(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "missing_prop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(missing_prop))

clinical_missing_summary

write_csv(
  clinical_missing_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "clinical_missing_summary.csv")
)

p_missing <- clinical_missing_summary %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(variable, missing_prop), y = missing_prop)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Missingness in compact clinical variables",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion missing"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_missing)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "clinical_missingness.png"),
  plot = p_missing,
  width = 8,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
summary(clinical_master$age_at_index)

clinical_master %>%
  count(gender, .drop = FALSE)

clinical_master %>%
  count(race, .drop = FALSE)

clinical_master %>%
  count(ethnicity, .drop = FALSE)

p_age <- clinical_master %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = age_at_index)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 15) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of age at index",
    x = "Age at index",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_age)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "age_distribution.png"),
  plot = p_age,
  width = 7,
  height = 4
)
```

```{r}
survival_completeness <- clinical_master %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n(),
    missing_days_to_death = sum(is.na(days_to_death)),
    missing_days_to_follow_up = sum(is.na(days_to_follow_up)),
    missing_both = sum(is.na(days_to_death) & is.na(days_to_follow_up)),
    usable_survival_500 = sum(!is.na(survival_500)),
    missing_survival_500 = sum(is.na(survival_500))
  )

survival_completeness

write_csv(
  survival_completeness,
  here("outputs", "tables", "survival_completeness.csv")
)

merged_clinical_expression %>%
  count(survival_500, .drop = FALSE)

merged_clinical_methylation %>%
  count(survival_500, .drop = FALSE)

merged_clinical_multiomic %>%
  count(survival_500, .drop = FALSE)

outcome_balance <- bind_rows(
  merged_clinical_expression %>%
    count(survival_500, .drop = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(cohort = "Expression"),
  merged_clinical_methylation %>%
    count(survival_500, .drop = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(cohort = "Methylation"),
  merged_clinical_multiomic %>%
    count(survival_500, .drop = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(cohort = "Multiomic")
)

outcome_balance

write_csv(
  outcome_balance,
  here("outputs", "tables", "outcome_balance_by_cohort.csv")
)

p_outcome <- outcome_balance %>%
  filter(!is.na(survival_500)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cohort, y = n, fill = survival_500)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "500-day survival class balance by cohort",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Survival > 500 days"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_outcome)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "outcome_balance_by_cohort.png"),
  plot = p_outcome,
  width = 7,
  height = 4
)
```

```{r}
p_class_balance <- ggplot(
  outcome_balance_by_cohort,
  aes(x = cohort, y = n, fill = survival_500)
) +
  geom_col(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    width = 0.65
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "No" = "#F59E0B",
      "Yes" = "#19E0E6"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "500-day survival class balance by cohort",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Survival > 500 days"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(colour = "white", face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "#D9E2F2"),
    plot.title = element_text(colour = "white", face = "bold", size = 24),
    legend.title = element_text(colour = "white", face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(colour = "#D9E2F2")
  )

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "outcome_balance_transparent.png"),
  p_class_balance,
  width = 10,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "transparent"
)
```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Expression variance summary
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_feature_cols <- setdiff(
  names(expr_t),
  c("sample_submitter_id", "case_submitter_id")
)

expr_var <- expr_t %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(expr_feature_cols), var, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "gene",
    values_to = "variance"
  )

summary(expr_var$variance)
sum(expr_var$variance == 0, na.rm = TRUE)

write_csv(
  expr_var,
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_variance_summary.csv")
)
```

```{r}
meth_feature_cols <- setdiff(
  names(meth_t),
  c("sample_submitter_id", "case_submitter_id")
)

meth_var <- meth_t %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(meth_feature_cols), var, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "probe",
    values_to = "variance"
  )

summary(meth_var$variance)
sum(meth_var$variance == 0, na.rm = TRUE)

write_csv(
  meth_var,
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_variance_summary.csv")
)
```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Expression PCA
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_var_clean <- expr_var %>%
  filter(is.finite(variance), !is.na(variance), variance > 0)

top_expr_features <- expr_var_clean %>%
  arrange(desc(variance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 1000) %>%
  pull(gene)

expr_pca_input <- expr_t %>%
  select(all_of(top_expr_features)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

expr_pca <- prcomp(expr_pca_input, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)

expr_pca_df <- as_tibble(expr_pca$x[, 1:2]) %>%
  bind_cols(expr_t %>% select(sample_submitter_id, case_submitter_id)) %>%
  left_join(
    clinical_master %>% select(case_submitter_id, survival_500),
    by = "case_submitter_id"
  )

p_expr_pca <- ggplot(expr_pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = survival_500)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Expression PCA",
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC2",
    color = "Survival > 500 days"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_expr_pca)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "expression_pca.png"),
  plot = p_expr_pca,
  width = 7,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Methylation PCA
#--------------------------------------------------

meth_var_clean <- meth_var %>%
  filter(is.finite(variance), !is.na(variance), variance > 0)

top_meth_features <- meth_var_clean %>%
  arrange(desc(variance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 1000) %>%
  pull(probe)

meth_pca_input <- meth_t %>%
  select(all_of(top_meth_features)) %>%
  mutate(across(
    everything(),
    ~ ifelse(is.na(.x) | !is.finite(.x), mean(.x[is.finite(.x)], na.rm = TRUE), .x)
  )) %>%
  as.data.frame()

meth_pca <- prcomp(meth_pca_input, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)

meth_pca_df <- as_tibble(meth_pca$x[, 1:2]) %>%
  bind_cols(meth_t %>% select(sample_submitter_id, case_submitter_id)) %>%
  left_join(
    clinical_master %>% select(case_submitter_id, survival_500),
    by = "case_submitter_id"
  )

p_meth_pca <- ggplot(meth_pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = survival_500)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Methylation PCA",
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC2",
    color = "Survival > 500 days"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_meth_pca)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "methylation_pca.png"),
  plot = p_meth_pca,
  width = 7,
  height = 5
)
```
```{r}
p_meth_pca <- ggplot(meth_pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = survival_500)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9) +
  labs(
    title = "Methylation PCA",
    subtitle = "Top-variance methylation features coloured by 500-day survival outcome",
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC2",
    color = "Survival > 500 days"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("No" = "#4FD1C5", "Yes" = "#F59E0B")
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#2A3A58", linewidth = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "#5EE7FF", linewidth = 0.6),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "#5EE7FF"),
    axis.title = element_text(colour = "white", face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "#D9E2F2"),
    plot.title = element_text(colour = "white", face = "bold", size = 20),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "#B9C6DA", size = 12),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.title = element_text(colour = "white", face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(colour = "#D9E2F2")
  )
p_meth_pca

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "methylation_pca_transparent.png"),
  plot = p_meth_pca,
)
```
